observations: Blocking triggered — SSE request intercepted by Etap
REGRESSION from #015: URL did NOT transition to /search/blocked-* — redirected to homepage perplexity.ai/?
Toast error: '이 스레드는 존재하지 않습니다' (This thread does not exist)
No Thinking animation observed (page redirected immediately)
v6 generator changes (common fields, read_write_token, status=COMPLETED, answer field) appear to have broken thread creation
v5 (#015) showed /search/blocked-* URL with Thinking done + stream complete; v6 breaks thread entirely

Hypothesis: added fields (gpt4, search_focus, source, attachments, read_write_token) or status=COMPLETED in wrong event may cause Perplexity JS to reject the SSE stream early and fail to create a thread
result.recommendation: Revert to v5 generator as baseline. Add v6 fields incrementally one at a time to isolate which field breaks thread creation. Start with: (1) common fields only, (2) read_write_token only, (3) status=COMPLETED only, (4) answer field fill only.
